programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A new cohort of junior doctors join the midwives, including Timothy, who observes the contrast between clinical medicine and compassionate care at Nonnatus House; Violet announces her plan to shadow the midwives.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: MaryLand on Masterpiece
programme.desc: When sisters Becca and Rosaline receive shocking news about their mother, they fly to the Isle of Man to find out more and are reunited in their sorrow after years of distance.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Edmond locates Gaston, Villefort's illegitimate child, who has grown up to be a thief; Danglars discovers Fernand's treacherous deeds in Algeria and reveals all to the press.

programme.title: The Puzzle Lady
programme.desc: When a suspect in the Gloria Hendrix case is found murdered, Cora risks everything to catch the perpetrator.

programme.title: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: Suspicions grow after a wife is murdered a year after her husband. The Countess and Hannes are offended by Lukas and Nina.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: An expectant father receives a life-threatening diagnosis; Trixie assists a female wrestler after a headlock goes wrong; Dr. Turner learns shocking news that implicates the future of the maternity house.

programme.desc: Martin wants to check out insects, while Chris would rather investigate the spider monkey.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Chicken Pox; Sick as a Dog
programme.desc: Arthur gets chicken pox just as the circus comes to town; Arthur blames D.W. for making his dog sick.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The kids learn what colors make up a rainbow just in time for a Mother's Day surprise.

programme.desc: Lyla and her sisters find a lost bag's owner; Lyla gets jealous when Ale gets attention.

programme.desc: The kids learn what colors make up a rainbow just in time for a Mother's Day surprise.

programme.sub-title: Daniel's Tiger Twirl; You Can Play Your Own Way
programme.desc: Miss Elaina shows off her cartwheel at the carnival, prompting Daniel to try it, too.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.sub-title: Birthday Dance Surprise; The Green Pepper
programme.desc: Phoebe plans a birthday surprise for Grandma; Phoebe and Jay must tend to the bell pepper in the garden.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Rudy feels angry when Abby asks him to share his toys, so his friends make a movie to show that sharing can be fun.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Sammys Primmo; Sammy Makes a Day
programme.desc: Sammy and Benito find a way to communicate; Sammy makes plans for his mom's visit.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.desc: Donkey makes Grampy a special card but she gets into a few sticky situations when she tries to deliver it to him; the pals help Harriett with her new invention for penguins.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: Purple Sweet Potato Buns; Tia's Big Break
programme.desc: Rosie, Jun and Grandpa Liu go to the Asian Market to buy more sweet potato buns; Rosie and Javi help Tia overcome her stage fright when she goes on a television cooking show.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.desc: The kids learn about crying as they set out on an adventure to help Miri; the kids and Mr. Bat look for Ari's ball after it goes missing in a cave.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.sub-title: The Missing Vote; Alma's Lemonade and Everything Else Stand
programme.desc: Alma and her friends must vote for either a new board game or art supplies; Alma and Harper open a lemonade stand.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: A family of beavers builds a dam that accidentally diverts water into Trini's garden, threatening her strawberries; Trini is determined to earn the Night Watchers Badge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am Rukmini Devi; I Am Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rukmini Devi reminds Xavier and Yadina why their annual family walk is special; Bob Ross shows Yadina that a small blunder can be a happy accident.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lucy Worsley's Holmes vs. Doyle
programme.desc: British historian Lucy Worsley delves into the complex love-hate relationship between Sherlock Holmes and the man who created him, Arthur Conan Doyle.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Based on the crime-novel series by author Caroline Graham, "Midsomer Murders" follows the efforts of Detective Chief Inspector John Barnaby to solve crimes that occur in the wealthy, isolated English county of Midsomer, a picturesque and peaceful place on the outside but one filled with amoral and snobbish eccentrics with all kinds of vices. His latest assistant is Detective Sergeant Jamie Winter. DCI Barnaby took over in series 14, replacing his older cousin, Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby, who retired.

programme.title: Samantha Brown's Places to Love
programme.desc: The tiny railroad town of Goffs in the eastern Mojave Desert; Amboy; the only piece of Route 66 that runs through a military installation; Elmer's Bottle Tree Ranch.

programme.title: BBC News The Context
programme.desc: A regular panel of guests from across the political spectrum discuss the biggest international stories of the day.

programme.title: BBC News America
programme.desc: Live news program produced out of BBC's Washington, D.C. bureau; host Sumi Somaskanda.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Wild Foods
programme.desc: Spring brings unique forageable foods like ramps, morels and fiddleheads; maintaining forest health and preserving its ecology makes foraging possible.

programme.title: Samantha Brown's Places to Love
programme.desc: A guided tour of Zurich; Museum Fur Gestaltung; Felsenegg cable car ride; Mount Uetilberg; Hiltl, the oldest vegetarian restaurant in the world; Yonex Badminton Halle.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1960 Ansel Adams Portfolio III: Yosemite Valley; a Persian Qashqai Gabbeh rug circa 1935; 1959 JFK's boxer shorts with signed photo.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: The French-American alliance changes the war and moves it to other theaters; navies battle off England and in the Caribbean, while armies advance in Indian Country and the South; the British take Charleston.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: The French-American alliance changes the war and moves it to other theaters; navies battle off England and in the Caribbean, while armies advance in Indian Country and the South; the British take Charleston.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: This daily news program, produced by Japanese public broadcaster NHK, focuses on headlines and current events in Japan and other Asian countries. English-speaking presenters also cover other areas of interest, including business news, science and technology trends, sports highlights, and global weather forecasts.

programme.desc: Lyla and her sisters find a lost bag's owner; Lyla gets jealous when Ale gets attention.

programme.desc: Arthur spices up an autobiographical story with fantastic tales; Arthur's dog, Pal, gets lost at a street fair.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: As a hurricane approaches, the Hunter kids learn about preparation and safety, moving furniture inside and checking their emergency supplies.

programme.sub-title: Four Little Piggies and Brucey; Handle With Care
programme.desc: Lyla and Luke create and act out variations on a fairy tale; Lyla, Louis and Stu track down a lost package.

programme.desc: Nico and Arugula start a hamster sitter business; Carl is afraid to tell his Mama that his new shoes hurt his feet.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: When Oscar tries to find someone disappointed by his disappoint-o-meter, he accidentally makes them happy.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Zadie's Horrible Haircut; A Day Out With Babby
programme.desc: Zadie must face her fear and go to the barber for a haircut; Malik discovers smart devices have limitations.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.desc: Captain Donkey and her crew search for the Ruby Red Tater Treasure; Panda finds his favorite hoodie, but it no longer fits.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: Iggy's Check Up; The New Park
programme.desc: Rosie helps Iggy get ready for his checkup; Rosie wants to play in the new park -- but it is a park for dogs.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.sub-title: Elinor's Fishy Friend; Do the Crane Dance
programme.desc: Elinor finds what she thinks is a fish in the pond, but she and her friends realize it's a tadpole turning into a frog; Elinor, Ari and Olive make up a dance.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.desc: Alma helps Andre prepare for a checkers tournament; Alma and Rafia compete for World's Greatest Artist.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Molly must find her mom's plane keys so she can get home in time for Mother's Day; Trini spots a talking white bird.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am Cesar Chavez; I Am Dolores Huerta
programme.desc: Cesar Chavez helps Xavier, Yadina and Brad find the inspiration to tackle a big mess in the playroom; Dolores Huerta teaches Xavier, Yadina and Brad that it is important to speak up when they see someone in need.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1960 Ansel Adams Portfolio III: Yosemite Valley; a Persian Qashqai Gabbeh rug circa 1935; 1959 JFK's boxer shorts with signed photo.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The celebrity version of "Antiques Road Trip" sees two antique experts paired up with celebrity guests as they scour for antiques on a road trip around the country. Each episode features different expert and celebrity pairs who search for valuable items at bargain-basement prices. Once they have found their items, they then head to auction where the collectibles are put up for bid, with any profits made at auction donated to charity.

programme.title: MaryLand on Masterpiece
programme.desc: When sisters Becca and Rosaline receive shocking news about their mother, they fly to the Isle of Man to find out more and are reunited in their sorrow after years of distance.

programme.title: BBC News The Context
programme.desc: A regular panel of guests from across the political spectrum discuss the biggest international stories of the day.

programme.title: BBC News America
programme.desc: Live news program produced out of BBC's Washington, D.C. bureau; host Sumi Somaskanda.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: In the Americas With David Yetman
programme.desc: Host David Yetman explores the landscapes, people and history of North America and South America. Stops along the way include the glacier-carved barrens of northern Canada, Mayan temples in Guatemala, ancient fortresses in Mexico and the Great Lakes of North America. Natives, immigrants, island mainlanders, pastoralists and city dwellers offer insight into their lives, work and homes. Episodes also feature visits to the wild mountains of western Argentina and volcanoes in Hawaii, Chile and Alaska.

programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: An age-old practice of knitting lace by Benedictine nuns; cooking a sacred dish by locals on Pakleni Islands.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actor Michael Douglas and writer/director Lena Dunham explore their family roots.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: British General Cornwallis struggles to pacify the southern states; supported by the French, a victory at Yorktown secures independence for the Americans.
